all_articles.description: To fully appreciate what is unfolding in the Jewish religious market space, it is essential to capture what is happening more broadly in the world of American religion. Liberal religious seminaries and umbrella organizations for liberal movements are experiencing significant membership decline, financial challenges, theological evolution and a pivot toward social justice activism over traditional... Read More The post The shifting religious landscape and its implications for American liberal Judaism appeared first on eJewishPhilanthropy .
all_articles.author: Steven Windmueller
